# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Sources

Link the public sources, governance records, repository references, or chain behavior used for factual claims.

## Risk Class

- [ ] Low: typo, one broken link, narrow copy correction, no shared systems
- [ ] Medium: one page or small docs cluster changed
- [ ] High: navigation, shared components, CSS, markdown rendering, generated indexes, scripts, workflows, deployment, security, or broad content migration

## Contributor Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run check`
- [ ] I reviewed the changed docs page locally
- [ ] Not run, and I understand GitHub checks are the merge authority

## Maintainer Review

- [ ] Factual/source review completed
- [ ] Neutrality and user-safety review completed
- [ ] Rendered QA completed when needed
- [ ] GitHub required checks passed
- [ ] Safe to publish to `main`
